shellCommands.command:
/bin/bash -lc "python3 - <<'PY'
import sys
sys.path.insert(0, '/home/user/workspace/src')
from vectorops import dotproduct
assert 1 == dotproduct([1,1], [0,1])
print('import-ok')
PY"

/bin/bash -lc "bash -lc 'if [ -f /home/user/workspace/pypi_server.pid ] && kill -0 \""'$(cat /home/user/workspace/pypi_server.pid)" 2>/dev/null; then kill "$(cat /home/user/workspace/pypi_server.pid)"; sleep 1; fi; nohup python3 -m http.server 8080 --directory /home/user/workspace/pypi >/home/user/workspace/pypi_server.log 2>&1 </dev/null & echo $! >/home/user/workspace/pypi_server.pid; sleep 1; kill -0 "$(cat /home/user/workspace/pypi_server.pid)"'"'"

/bin/bash -lc "python3 -m venv /home/user/workspace/.venv-test && /home/user/workspace/.venv-test/bin/pip install --index-url http://localhost:8080/simple vectorops==0.1.0 && /home/user/workspace/.venv-test/bin/python - <<'PY'
from vectorops import dotproduct
assert 1 == dotproduct([1,1], [0,1])
print(dotproduct([1,2,3],[4,5,6]))
PY"

/bin/bash -lc "bash -lc 'rm -f /home/user/workspace/pypi_server.pid /home/user/workspace/pypi_server.log; setsid python3 -m http.server 8080 --directory /home/user/workspace/pypi >/home/user/workspace/pypi_server.log 2>&1 < /dev/null & echo "'$! >/home/user/workspace/pypi_server.pid; sleep 2; ps -p "$(cat /home/user/workspace/pypi_server.pid)" -f; cat /home/user/workspace/pypi_server.log || true'"'"

/bin/bash -lc "rm -rf /home/user/workspace/.venv-test && python3 -m venv /home/user/workspace/.venv-test && /home/user/workspace/.venv-test/bin/pip install --index-url http://localhost:8080/simple vectorops==0.1.0 && /home/user/workspace/.venv-test/bin/python - <<'PY'
from vectorops import dotproduct
assert 1 == dotproduct([1,1], [0,1])
print('dot=', dotproduct([1,2,3],[4,5,6]))
PY
/home/user/workspace/.venv-test/bin/python -m vectorops '[1,1]' '[0,1]'"
